title: Arcanic Armaments
description: Adds unique and powerful weaponry to your game!
body:
![The Arcanic Armaments banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/978efcf213a46e6815e01ffcfbe8d59f59a282b9.png)

## Welcome to Arcanic Armaments! This mod adds new, powerful, and relatively hard to obtain weapons that will assist you in battle!

<center>

### Join our discord to stay up to date with mod updates, teasers, and more! (click)
[![Discord banner image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cea9cd7dc8511b56c21d5eef30b040a9f9f81d2.png)](https://discord.gg/mEYDh4SUWN)

</center>

### Requires GeckoLib!
[![GeckoLib logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/197e417b0e192c49a53b39d7ad40764848f6959a.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

### MATERIALS

>**Sculkmarrow Fragment**

Crafted using a sculk catalyst, it is a primary ingredient in sculk-related weaponry.

>**Supersonic Bow Grip**

Crafted using sculkmarrow fragments, it is a main ingredient for crafting the Supersonic Bow.

>**Spinehandle**

Crafted using sticks, sculkmarrow fragments and sculk, it is used to craft the Soulwhisperer

>**Soulwhisperer Blade**

Crafted using sculkmarrow fragments and sculk, it is also used to craft the Soulwhisperer

>**Warden Tendril**

Used to craft the Supersonic Bow, wardens can drop 1-2 of them each.

![All of the materials in an ancient city](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/157a80e2a7513adb300ec711a08c2a19893ab655.png)

### WEAPONS

>**Sceptre of The Moon**

Crafted with iron, diamonds and ender pearls, this powerful sceptre can cast meteors from the sky, exploding on nearby monsters. Can also be used to craft the Sceptre of Lunar Duality.

![The Sceptre of The Moon in an item frame in the end](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd31cb5decbde26525f344c716217b82e74b49c3.png)

>**Sceptre of The Sun**

Crafted using gold, iron and magma blocks, it can be used to rapidly heal nearby players for a short duration, but has a long cooldown. Also used to craft the Sceptre of Lunar Duality.

![The Sceptre of The Sun in an item frame in the end](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/269ec002c4cc756d6cc47e790690e49584294ca6.png)

>**Sceptre of Lunar Duality**

Crafted using lots of iron, as well as both of the previous sceptres, this sceptre can cast solar beams from the sky, dealing fire damage to foes. As these beams rain from the sky, the distance that they spawn will also increase, allowing for a larger area of effect.

![The Sceptre of Lunar Duality in an item frame in the end](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e786bc65d99ef43100ab81a16c261dbf05678013.png)

>**Supersonic Bow**

Crafted using warden tendrils, iron blocks, sculk and a supersonic bow grip, this powerful bow acts simularly to a crossbow, being able to be charged and activated later. Shoots sonic booms, which deal very high damage, and can pierce up to 5 enemies. Its attacks also ignore armor, simular to the warden's sonic boom attack.

![The Supersonic Bow in an item frame in an ancient city](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ff70729e5393d304b20e5fb4954ab42bc06ba23.png)

>**Soulwhisperer**

A scythe crafted using spinehandles, iron and the soulwhisperer blade, this powerful scythe can absorb the souls of foes, and when the player absorbs at least 3 souls, they can right-click the ground to summon a sculk tendril, which will attack whatever the player attacks, simularly to a wolf. Sculk tendrils cannot move, but have large range, and can also occasionally slam the ground, causing AoE damage.

![The Soulwhisperer in an item frame in an ancient city](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13735b60d1a646a44d2eeb6764593ad325248d38.png)

### Q&A

>Q: NeoForge/Fabric/Quilt?

A: No, sorry.

>Q: Will you backport to below/above 1.20.1?

A: No. Porting versions is buggy, annoying and generally unenjoyable. Modding is my passion project. If i dont enjoy modding, i won't mod.

>Q: Can i port this mod to Fabric/Quilt/NeoForge?

A: Go ahead. All i ask is to credit me in the description and link to the original mod page.

> Q: Can i use this in my modpack?

A: Sure, You can give credit if you want, but i won't enforce it.
